text.autoconfig.tiered.title: Tiered Config
commands.tiered.failed: Nothing changed. Targets main hand is empty
commands.tiered.untier_failed: Nothing changed. %s from %s has no tier
commands.tiered.tiering_failed: Nothing changed. %s from %s has no given tier
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.attributeC: Defines how attribute colors will be displayed on weapon and armor tooltips.
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.merchantLe:
If true, the rarity of items sold by villagers will depend on their profession level.
Master villagers will guarantee better items.
If false, rarity is completely random regardless of level.
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.enableTier: Draws a solid colored line around the tooltip based on the tier's rarity color.
Draws custom textures (corners and top icon) around the tooltip.
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.uniqueTool: Choose when to display the Unique Attributes.
Always: Shows them all the time.
On Shift: Hides them to keep the tooltip clean.
Off: Does not show the Unique Attributes.
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.reforgeXpC:
Sets the amount of XP points required to reforge an item in the Reforge Table.
Default: 50
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.uniqueRefo:
Permite reforjar itens unicos na Reforja.
Padrão: Não
text.autoconfig.tiered.option.enableDefa:
If disabled, the mod will not load the default attributes (Unique, Legendary, etc).
Useful for Modpack makers who want to use only their own Datapacks (using a custom namespace).
screen.tiered.reforge_insert_equipment: Place an equipment in the center
tiered.arpg.message.awaken: Your weapon has awakened a new power!
tiered.arpg.message.levelup: Your equipment leveled up to Level %s!
